---
title: "UF Neurology Living Handbook"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: hero
A practical index for neurology residents, fellows, and faculty.

Use the search bar or browse by topic below.
:::

## General Neurology

::: index-list
-   [Neurologic Examination](neurologic_examination.qmd)
-   [Mental Status Exam](mental_status_exam.qmd)
-   [Dementia and Aphasia](dementia_and_aphasia.qmd)
-   [Encephalopathy](encephalopathy.qmd)
-   [Altered Mental Status Workup](altered_mental_status_workup.qmd)
-   [Delirium Management](delirium_management.qmd)
-   [Dermatomes](dermatomes.qmd)
-   [Upper Extremity Strength Testing](upper_extremity_strength.qmd)
-   [Lower Extremity Strength Testing](lower_extremity_strength.qmd)
:::

## Vascular / Stroke

::: index-list
-   [Vascular Neurology](vascular_neurology.qmd)
-   [Stroke Alert](stroke_alert.qmd)
-   [VA Stroke Alert](va_stroke_alert.qmd)
-   [Stroke Admission Orders](stroke_admission_orders.qmd)
-   [Intracerebral Hemorrhage](intracerebral_hemorrhage.qmd)
-   [Subarachnoid Hemorrhage](subarachnoid_hemorrhage.qmd)
-   [Anticoagulation Reversal](anticoagulation_reversal.qmd)
-   [TIA Risk Stratification and Stroke Mechanisms](tia_risk_stratification_and_stroke_mechanisms.qmd)
-   [Modified Rankin Scale](modified_rankin_scale.qmd)
-   [NIHSS and Tools](nihss_and_tools.qmd)
:::

## Emergencies

::: index-list
-   [Seizure Consult](seizure_consult.qmd)
-   [Convulsive Status Epilepticus](convulsive_status_epilepticus.qmd)
-   [Nonconvulsive Status Epilepticus](nonconvulsive_status_epilepticus.qmd)
-   [Lumbar Puncture](lumbar_puncture.qmd)
-   [Cardiac Arrest](cardiac_arrest.qmd)
-   [Brain Death](brain_death.qmd)
-   [TBI](tbi.qmd)
-   [Cervical Spine Clearance](cervical_spine_clearance.qmd)
-   [Movement Disorder Emergencies](movement_disorder_emergencies.qmd)
-   [Neuro-Ophthalmologic Emergencies](neuro_ophthalmologic_emergencies.qmd)
-   [Neuro-Oncology Complications and Emergencies](neuro_oncology_complications_and_emergencies.qmd)
:::

## Neurocritical Care

::: index-list
-   [Subarachnoid Hemorrhage](subarachnoid_hemorrhage.qmd)
-   [ICP and Herniation Management](icp_and_herniation_management.qmd)
-   [Mechanical Ventilation](mechanical_ventilation.qmd)
-   [Intracranial Vascular Malformations](intracranial_vascular_malformation.qmd)
-   [Sodium Management](sodium_management.qmd)
-   [Fluids](fluids.qmd)
-   [Blood Pressure Pharmacology](blood_pressure_pharmacology.qmd)
-   [Common Critical Care Pharmacology](common_critical_care_pharmacology.qmd)
-   [Drug Pharmacokinetics Affecting Neuro Exam](drug_pharmacokinetics_affecting_neuro_exam.qmd)
-   [Management of PSH](management_of_psh.qmd)
:::

## Epilepsy

::: index-list
-   [Epilepsy](epilepsy.qmd)
-   [Antiseizure Medications](antiseizure_medications.qmd)
:::

## Headache

::: index-list
-   [Headache](headache.qmd)
-   [Acute Headache Management](acute_headache_management.qmd)
-   [DHE Protocol](dhe_protocol.qmd)
-   [Headache in Pregnancy](headache_in_pregnancy.qmd)
-   [Idiopathic Intracranial Hypertension](idiopathic_intracranial_hypertension.qmd)
:::

## Neuromuscular

::: index-list
-   [Neuromuscular](neuromuscular.qmd)
-   [Myasthenia Gravis](myasthenia_gravis.qmd)
-   [Guillain-Barré Syndrome / AIDP](guillain_barre_syndrome_aidp.qmd)
:::

## Neuroimmunology

::: index-list
-   [Neuroimmunology](neuroimmunology.qmd)
-   [Multiple Sclerosis](multiple_sclerosis.qmd)
-   [Optic Neuritis and Transverse Myelitis](optic_neuritis_and_transverse_myelitis.qmd)
:::

## Neurotology

::: index-list
-   [Neurotology](neurotology.qmd)
-   [Dizziness Evaluation](dizziness_evaluation.qmd)
-   [Etiologies of Dizziness](etiologies_of_dizziness.qmd)
:::

## Movement Disorders

::: index-list
-   [Acute Manifestations of Parkinson Disease](acute_manifestations_of_parkinson_disease.qmd)
-   [Neuroleptic Malignant Syndrome, Serotonin Syndrome, and Acute Dystonia](neuroleptic_malignant_syndrome,_serotonin_syndrome,_and_acute_dystonia.qmd)
:::

## Infectious / Other

::: index-list
-   [Neuroinfectious Disease](neuroinfectious_disease.qmd)
:::

## About

::: index-list
-   [About This Handbook](about.qmd)
:::
